---
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{RTT Improvement Report}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(NHSRwaitinglist)

rep_rtt_improvement(
  c(2000, 1500, 1000, 900, 800, 700, 600, 500, 450, 400, 350, 300, 250, 200, 150, 100, 90, 80, 70, 60, 50)
)

```
